category_title: Engaged elementary students with mild disabilities or general education needs
scenario_title: Discussing volatile bullying issues and personal experiences
minimal_context: The student is participating in a small-group discussion about a cartoon panel showing eagles picking on a small bird to explore the feelings of bullying victims.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's look at this cartoon panel with the eagles picking on the small bird and discuss what is happening.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Waves hands high) Oh! oh! They are bullying the small bird. I want to talk about this instead of making our own cartoons.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Okay, what do you think about the bullying in the cartoon?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: It makes me really upset. I know about the recent deaths of students nationwide because of bullying.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What would you do if you saw someone being bullied like that?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Facial expression changes to angry) If he saw somebody getting bullied, he would punch the one who started it!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's look at this cartoon panel with the eagles picking on the small bird and discuss what is happening.

STUDENT: (Waves hands high) Oh! oh! They are bullying the small bird. I want to talk about this instead of making our own cartoons.

TUTOR: Okay, what do you think about the bullying in the cartoon?

STUDENT: It makes me really upset. I know about the recent deaths of students nationwide because of bullying.

TUTOR: What would you do if you saw someone being bullied like that?

STUDENT: (Facial expression changes to angry) If he saw somebody getting bullied, he would punch the one who started it!

task.content: Participating in a group discussion about personal experiences with bullying and the feelings of victims

context.materials: Cartoon panels (e.g., eagles picking on a small bird, body language of a turtle)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the topic of bullying was brought up
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Difficult for many to control emotions when discussing bullying

behavior_patterns.condition: Discussing potential responses to witnessing bullying behavior
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Said that if he saw somebody getting bullied, he would punch the one who started it
behavior_patterns.internal_state: He didn't see the connection that punching may also be bullying
related_quotes: if he saw somebody getting bullied, he would punch the one who started it
